# Substack | Signup

Source: https://substack..Upa75T_Cg4sLXQ3bD2MCJ-dmxksGJ8DtT1kIxfg5GHk?

Create your account
Sign up now, and publishing is free forever. Once you start charging for subscriptions, you keep 90% after credit card transaction fees.
